topic: ACL main page 2 introduction contribution-list linebreak polish

before_text_matches: page 2 line 087: QA, prompt contracts, and coordinate-
page 2 line 095: 4. We anchor material-effect and embodied-
defect.reader_effect: The contribution list carried the right claim boundaries, but two narrow list lines split key compound terms at the line end.

changes.summary: Shortened contribution 2 from coordinate-frame scoring to coordinate scoring.
Rewrote contribution 4 as a concise material-and-stack gate covering the NVIDIA material audit, 99 KuJiaLe VLN episodes, and repeated load/render checks.

rejected_iterations.summary: First rewrite removed the target coordinate-/embodied- breaks but introduced new contribution-4 splits including san-, se-, offi-, and sup-.
Second rewrite introduced a Ku- split in KuJiaLe.
Third rewrite introduced au-, re-, and sup- splits in the same contribution item.

after_evidence.targeted_scan_result: Page 2 shows no alphabetic hyphenated line-end tokens after the accepted rewrite. Page 3 retains only the unrelated literal compound sim-to-.
after_evidence.visual_result: The page 2 contribution list remains stable, with contribution 2 and contribution 4 wrapping cleanly and no visible overlap or crowding.

claim_boundary: Introduction contribution wording and linebreak polish only. No metric values, evidence pools, figures, citations, metadata, or supported/forbidden claim scopes were changed.
residual_risk: The page-3 scan still reports the unrelated literal compound sim-to-. This round intentionally scoped to page-2 contribution-list linebreaks.
